metadata.title: Strong Enough (Pumpin' Dolls Radio Edit)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:02.04] I don't need your sympathy
[00:06.02] There's nothing you can say or do for me
[00:09.47] And I don't want a miracle
[00:13.98] You'll never change for no one
[00:17.51] And I hear your reasons why
[00:21.34] Where did you sleep last night?
[00:25.10] And was she worth it?
[00:28.17] Was she worth it?
[00:33.36] I'm strong enough to live without you
[00:37.17] Strong enough and I quit crying
[00:40.87] Long enough
[00:42.23] Now I'm strong enough
[00:44.30] To know you gotta go
[00:47.73] There's no more to say
[00:49.50] So save your breath and walk away
[00:53.22] No matter what I hear you say
[00:56.93] I'm strong enough
[00:58.94] To know you gotta go
[01:03.04] (You gotta go, you gotta go)
[01:04.81] (You gotta go, you gotta go)
[01:09.66] So you feel misunderstood
[01:14.09] Baby have I got news for you
[01:17.16] On being used, I could write the book
[01:21.69] But you don't wanna hear about it
[01:25.37] 'Cause I've been losing sleep
[01:29.05] And you've been going cheap
[01:32.68] And she ain't worth half of me it's true
[01:37.74] I'm telling you, that
[01:39.32] I'm strong enough to live without you
[01:43.12] Strong enough and I quit crying
[01:46.88] Long enough now I'm strong enough
[01:50.27] To know you gotta go
[01:53.94] (You gotta go, you gotta go)
[02:01.26] (You gotta go, you gotta go)
[02:03.05] (You gotta go, you gotta go)
[02:06.74] (You gotta go, you gotta go)
[02:09.41] Come hell or waters high
[02:13.17] You'll never see me cry
[02:16.81] This is our last goodbye, it's true I'm telling you, now
[02:23.37] I'm strong enough to live without you
[02:27.03] Strong enough and I quit crying
[02:30.88] Long enough now I'm strong enough
[02:34.22] To know you gotta go
[02:37.74] There's no more to say
[02:39.43] So save your breath and walk away
[02:43.22] No matter what I hear you say I'm strong enough to know you gotta go
[02:53.56] I'm strong enough(you gonna go)
[02:56.06] I'm strong enough
[03:00.45] Strong enough
